conversations.title: Evidence chain audit
conversations.snippet: Verify weekly claims against conversation_id references.

conversations.title: Rollback accountability logs
conversations.snippet: Add trace fields for regression triage.

highlights: The weekly evidence chain now requires each major claim to map to a valid conversation_id and supporting note.
recurring_questions: How can evidence consistency remain strong while semantic repair loops are still allowed for quality recovery?

cross_domain_echoes.shared_logic: Both workflows rely on traceable links so each decision can be validated and reversed safely.

unresolved_threads: We still need better metrics on how model variability impacts evidence note quality across providers.
suggested_focus: Automate evidence consistency checks and feed failing samples directly into weekly eval gold cases.

evidence.note: Defined audit checks for claim-to-conversation mapping.
Specified evidence_ids normalization for cross-domain echoes.
Added rollback and accountability logging templates.
